refs.purpose: Ground collection-shape choices in curated, corpus-observed operation and recipe patterns.
refs.trigger: When selecting collection cleanup, reshape, identifier, or collection-tabular bridge patterns.

refs.purpose: Ground conditional-branch and optional-step choices in curated, corpus-observed Galaxy when/pick_value patterns.
refs.trigger: When data-flow translation needs optional steps, gating on non-empty results, routing between alternative outputs, or transform-or-pass-through branches.

refs.purpose: Ground genomic-interval operation choices in curated, corpus-observed Galaxy interval recipes.
refs.trigger: When the workflow operates on genomic intervals (BED/GFF/VCF coordinate features) and data-flow translation needs overlap, merge, coverage, windowing, masking, or set-algebra steps.

refs.purpose: Ground tabular bridge and table-operation choices in curated, corpus-observed operation patterns.
refs.trigger: When data-flow translation needs filtering, joining, aggregation, pivoting, or tabular-collection bridges.

refs.purpose: Keep the data-flow brief separate from gxformat2 templating and concrete step implementation.
refs.verification: Promote after two worked freeform-to-Galaxy translations preserve this Mold boundary without moving fields.

refs.purpose: Preserve per-row metadata on the data-flow side: keep sample_sheet column_definitions wired through identifier-keyed steps instead of dropping into parallel parameter inputs, and re-attach metadata after map-over steps that lose it.
refs.trigger: When the interface brief carries a sample_sheet[:paired|:paired_or_unpaired|:record] input, or the free-form summary describes per-sample/per-record metadata that must survive map-over steps.

produces.description: Reviewable Markdown brief: abstract operations, collection map/reduce choices, shape-changing placeholder steps, unresolved Galaxy tool needs, confidence, open questions.

consumes.description: Free-form source summary emitted by [[summarize-paper]] or [[interview-to-freeform-summary]]; consumed alongside the Galaxy interface brief.
Preceding Galaxy interface brief from [[freeform-summary-to-galaxy-interface]] that pins inputs, outputs, and labels.
